{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 1.0,

    "R1.5": 0.7,

    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the review prioritize (A) scientific content (novelty, logic, claims) or (B) writing and presentation (grammar, clarity, flow)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The review should clarify the primary conceptual contribution of the described framework.",
    "R1.2": "The review must verify the logical consistency of the multi-stage pipeline description.",
    "R1.3": "The review must assess whether the reported performance metrics support the claim of competitiveness.",
    "R1.4": "The review must evaluate the claimed novelty of the selection-based aggregator against prior work.",
    "R1.5": "The review should assess the narrative structure and flow of the paragraphs within the section.",
    "R1.6": "The review should identify and correct issues in grammar, conciseness, and sentence-level clarity.",
    "R1.7": "The review should evaluate the appropriateness and context of the cited prior work.",
    "RX.1": "The review must consider whether the text's disclosure of limitations is adequate.",
    "RX.2": "The review must ensure the performance claims are not overstated relative to the evidence provided.",
    "RX.3": "The review must be confined to the provided artifact text for 'this section'.",
    "RX.4": "The review must remain aware of the clinical context and potential patient impact of this diagnostic technology.",
    "RX.5": "All feedback must be clearly traceable to specific statements within the source artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review prioritize (A) scientific content (novelty, logic, claims) or (B) writing and presentation (grammar, clarity, flow)?

rationale.R1.1: The review should clarify the primary conceptual contribution of the described framework.
rationale.R1.2: The review must verify the logical consistency of the multi-stage pipeline description.
rationale.R1.3: The review must assess whether the reported performance metrics support the claim of competitiveness.
rationale.R1.4: The review must evaluate the claimed novelty of the selection-based aggregator against prior work.
rationale.R1.5: The review should assess the narrative structure and flow of the paragraphs within the section.
rationale.R1.6: The review should identify and correct issues in grammar, conciseness, and sentence-level clarity.
rationale.R1.7: The review should evaluate the appropriateness and context of the cited prior work.
rationale.RX.1: The review must consider whether the text's disclosure of limitations is adequate.
rationale.RX.2: The review must ensure the performance claims are not overstated relative to the evidence provided.
rationale.RX.3: The review must be confined to the provided artifact text for 'this section'.
rationale.RX.4: The review must remain aware of the clinical context and potential patient impact of this diagnostic technology.
rationale.RX.5: All feedback must be clearly traceable to specific statements within the source artifact.
